creator: Weirton Steel Company
description: Investigation of German industrial production capabilities after the devastation of World War II. With striking images of destroyed German cities and factories. Amateur film made by George T. Fonda, assistant to the president, Weirton Steel Company.
subject: World War II: Postwar issues
World War II: Germany
Germany
title: Postwar Germany: 28 Months After V-E Day (Part III)
